_description: GRAO exp_05 — Trace Quality & Coverage Matrix validation
data_source: tpg-grao/traces directory inventory + gnw/stability README scan
hypothesis: Implementing trace quality scoring and coverage gap detection will increase actionable gradient yield by 25% and reduce trace storage by 40% through deduplication and compression

quality_assessment.timestamp_accuracy: high — all traces have precise ISO timestamps
quality_assessment.data_richness: medium — traces capture event metadata but lack gradient derivation context
quality_assessment.completeness: partial — single-day snapshot, no multi-day trend data
quality_assessment.gradient_derivability: low — traces exist but no trace-to-gradient conversion rate tracking

potential_duplicates.evidence: Same timestamp (03:45:25-539Z), likely capturing overlapping stability check data

results.coverage_status: partial — 7/8 source types covered, experience and user_interaction missing

coverage_gaps.recommendation: Add experience traces from GRAO round data and experiment results
Add user interaction traces from Telegram/Discord message patterns

validation.hypothesis_supported: partial — coverage gap detection validated (2 missing types), but actionable gradient yield improvement not measurable without gradient data
validation.evidence: Trace inventory shows 7/8 coverage (0.875 ratio), 6-day temporal gap, single-day snapshot. Deduplication candidate found (stability_memory ↔ stability_storage). Quality score 0.45 — below threshold for actionable gradients.
validation.limitations: No gradient data available in traces for conversion rate analysis. Single-day snapshot limits temporal analysis. No pre-implementation baseline.

actions: Implement trace quality schema (scoring 0-1 for timestamp, richness, completeness, derivability)
Add experience and user_interaction trace sources
Implement deduplication engine for stability_memory/stability_storage overlap
Trigger supplemental collection for coverage gaps (experience, user_interaction)

notes: First trace quality assessment. Coverage gap detection validated — 2 missing types (experience, user_interaction). Quality score 0.45 confirms need for quality schema. Deduplication candidate confirmed. Impact 0.55 — moderate improvement potential. Requires gradient data for full validation.
